question.label: Friction scan
question.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
question.description: Invites them to name blockers without framing it as complaint.

answer: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week.

assessment.note: Indicated coasting this week suggests a slight dip in engagement.

new_queue.label: Exploring quieter energy
new_queue.name: What do you think is behind your quieter energy this week?

new_queue.label: Team recognition
new_queue.name: How did it feel to see the team's response to the payments refactor success?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Current blockers check
new_queue.name: What blockers or dependencies are you currently facing that we haven't discussed?

new_queue.label: Mentoring opportunities
new_queue.name: What kind of mentoring opportunities are you envisioning for yourself?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
